name: Cala Trebalúger
description: One of the most beautiful virgin coves: white sand, limestone cliffs, pines down to the shore and a small stream meeting the sea at one end. Reachable only on foot, it stays peaceful; with no facilities, bring water and supplies.

highlights: reach on foot or by boat one of the island's most beautiful unspoilt coves
enjoy white sand, pines down to the shore and a stream to one side
plan your return: a demanding walk and no facilities at all
